enemy_templates.name: Pirate Scout
enemy_templates.description: A fast, lightly armed scout vessel. Prefers to flee when outmatched.

moves.name: Light Blaster
moves.description: A quick, low-power blaster shot.

enemy_templates.name: Pirate Raider
enemy_templates.description: A well-armed raider that attacks aggressively and without mercy.

moves.name: Raider Cannon
moves.description: A heavy-hitting cannon favored by pirates.

moves.name: Concussion Missile
moves.description: An explosive missile with area damage potential.

enemy_templates.name: Pirate Heavy
enemy_templates.description: A heavily armored pirate vessel that fights defensively, shielding allies.

moves.name: Twin Turret
moves.description: Dual turret fire.

moves.name: Shield Boost
moves.description: Restores shields and reduces incoming damage.

enemy_templates.name: Smuggler
enemy_templates.description: A nimble smuggler vessel. Will flee rather than fight if given the chance.

moves.name: Concealed Blaster
moves.description: A hidden weapon for emergencies.

moves.name: Chaff Burst
moves.description: Releases chaff to improve evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Patrol Vessel
enemy_templates.description: A well-maintained patrol ship. Fights defensively and hard to negotiate with.

moves.name: Military Laser
moves.description: Standard-issue military laser.

moves.name: Shield Regenerator
moves.description: Restores shields.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Enforcer
enemy_templates.description: A Commerce Guild patrol ship enforcing trade regulations. Well-shielded and methodical.

moves.name: Regulation Laser
moves.description: Standard-issue Guild enforcement weapon.

moves.name: Trade Shield
moves.description: Reinforced shields issued to Guild enforcement vessels.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Dreadnought
enemy_templates.description: A Commerce Guild capital-class enforcer. Heavily armed and drains enemy systems.

moves.name: Trade Battery
moves.description: A devastating broadside from Guild-issue cannons.

moves.name: System Disruptor
moves.description: Drains enemy energy reserves while dealing light damage.

enemy_templates.name: Union Brawler
enemy_templates.description: A rugged Miners' Union combat vessel. Hits hard with improvised mining weapons.

moves.name: Mining Drill Ram
moves.description: A repurposed mining drill used as a close-range weapon.

moves.name: Ore Plating
moves.description: Reinforces hull with compressed ore plating.

enemy_templates.name: Union Crusher
enemy_templates.description: A massive Miners' Union warship built from salvaged mining rigs. Deals devastating damage.

moves.name: Asteroid Hammer
moves.description: A massive kinetic strike from a converted mining arm.

moves.name: Field Repairs
moves.description: Quick hull patching from spare mining materials.

enemy_templates.name: Science Probe
enemy_templates.description: A Science Collective autonomous probe. Drains shields and evades with advanced technology.

moves.name: Analysis Beam
moves.description: A precise energy beam that disrupts shields.

moves.name: Phase Shift
moves.description: Temporarily shifts out of phase, greatly increasing evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Science Sentinel
enemy_templates.description: A Science Collective guardian vessel. Uses advanced technology for damage reduction and accuracy disruption.

moves.name: Neural Disruptor
moves.description: Disrupts targeting systems, reducing enemy accuracy.

moves.name: Energy Barrier
moves.description: Projects an energy barrier, reducing incoming damage and restoring shields.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Raider
enemy_templates.description: A fast Frontier Alliance strike craft. Relies on speed and precision.

moves.name: Rapid Fire
moves.description: A quick burst of energy bolts from frontier-modified weapons.

moves.name: Thruster Boost
moves.description: Engages afterburners for increased evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Gunship
enemy_templates.description: A heavily armed Frontier Alliance warship. Fast and devastating with multiple weapon systems.

moves.name: Weapons Barrage
moves.description: Fires all weapon systems simultaneously.

moves.name: Strafing Run
moves.description: A high-speed attack pass dealing moderate damage.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Revenue Cutter
enemy_templates.description: A light Commerce Guild patrol craft. Revenue Cutters enforce trade regulations and inspect cargo manifests. Lightly armed but persistent  -- their job is to detain, not destroy.

moves.name: Regulation Scanner
moves.description: A targeting scan that marks the vessel for enforcement. Disrupts evasive maneuvers.

moves.name: Warning Shot
moves.description: A low-power deterrent blast. Standard Guild enforcement protocol.

enemy_templates.name: Union Picket
enemy_templates.description: A converted mining skiff pressed into convoy escort duty. Small and tough, crewed by miners who decided shooting pirates beats drilling rock. Armed with improvised weapons powered by engines built to haul ten times their weight.

moves.name: Slag Launcher
moves.description: Fires superheated mining slag. Inaccurate but packs a punch.

moves.name: Reinforced Plating
moves.description: Activates compressed-ore hull reinforcement.

enemy_templates.name: Science Surveyor
enemy_templates.description: A Collective research vessel repurposed for patrol duty. High sensor resolution and excellent shields, but minimal weapons. Prefers to scan, analyze, and evade  -- but its analysis beam strips shields with clinical precision.

moves.name: Scan Pulse
moves.description: A focused energy scan that disrupts shield harmonics.

moves.name: Evasion Protocol
moves.description: Engages automated evasion subroutines.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Skirmisher
enemy_templates.description: A fast Alliance interceptor built for hit-and-run tactics. Light, agile, and crewed by the best seat-of-the-pants flyers in the Expanse. Armed with quick-firing modified weapons that compensate for low power with high accuracy.

moves.name: Quick Burst
moves.description: A rapid volley from frontier-modified blasters.

moves.name: Afterburn
moves.description: Hard thruster burn for evasive repositioning.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Rust Runner
enemy_templates.description: A fast, light harassment vessel built from courier wreckage in the scrapyards of Crimson Reach. Armed with corrosive slug-throwers that eat through hull plating. Its job is to harry and harass, not to stand and fight.

moves.name: Corrosive Slug
moves.description: A corroded metal slug laced with reactor coolant. Eats through shields.

moves.name: Scrapyard Jink
moves.description: Erratic evasive maneuver learned from dodging debris in the Reach.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Wrecker
enemy_templates.description: A medium combat vessel built from salvaged military hulls in Crimson Reach. Equipped with grapple launchers and a reinforced ram prow  -- Reach combat doctrine favors getting close and tearing ships apart for salvage. Why destroy what you can repurpose?

moves.name: Grapple Ram
moves.description: Closes distance and rams with a reinforced prow. Devastating but hard to aim.

moves.name: Hull Ripper
moves.description: Cutting torches repurposed for combat. Strips shields and scores hull.

moves.name: Salvage Plating
moves.description: Welds scrap plating over damaged sections mid-combat.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Dreadwreck
enemy_templates.description: A massive amalgamation of ship carcasses welded into a single hulking combat platform. Slow, poorly shielded, but absurdly durable and bristling with weapons salvaged from a dozen different sources. Each Dreadwreck is unique and terrifying.

moves.name: Scrapyard Barrage
moves.description: Fires every weapon simultaneously  -- a chaotic storm of mismatched ordnance.

moves.name: Toxic Overcharge
moves.description: Vents unshielded reactor exhaust at the target. Damages hull and drains energy systems.

moves.name: Ablative Wreckage
moves.description: Sacrifices outer hull plating to absorb damage and effect emergency repairs.

enemy_templates.name: Freelance Tracker
enemy_templates.description: A fast, lightly armed bounty tracking vessel. Relies on speed to catch targets, but flees when outgunned.

moves.name: Tracking Pulse
moves.description: A precise targeting pulse that reduces evasion.

moves.name: Pursuit Burn
moves.description: Hard engine burn for evasion while closing distance.

enemy_templates.name: Bounty Enforcer
enemy_templates.description: A well-armed bounty hunter ship. Balanced loadout optimized for disabling targets.

moves.name: Disabling Cannon
moves.description: A heavy shot designed to cripple engines and drain shields.

moves.name: Tractor Net
moves.description: Deploys an electromagnetic net that reduces target evasion.

enemy_templates.name: Bounty Vanguard
enemy_templates.description: A heavily shielded bounty hunting vessel. Absorbs punishment while wearing down targets with sustained fire.

moves.name: Suppression Barrage
moves.description: Sustained weapons fire that chips at hull and accuracy.

moves.name: Shield Wall
moves.description: Maximizes shield output and reduces incoming damage.

enemy_templates.name: Bounty Ace
enemy_templates.description: An elite freelance hunter flying a custom interceptor. Extremely fast and accurate  -- almost impossible to outrun.

moves.name: Precision Shot
moves.description: A carefully aimed shot that bypasses evasion. High accuracy, moderate damage.

moves.name: Afterburner Strafe
moves.description: High-speed attack run dealing damage while boosting evasion.

moves.name: Tracking Shot
moves.description: Locks onto the target's engine signature. Unavoidable but lower damage.

enemy_templates.name: Sector Authority Enforcer
enemy_templates.description: A top-tier enforcement vessel deployed by the sector council. Three weapon systems, heavy armor, and zero tolerance for criminals.

moves.name: Authority Lance
moves.description: A devastating directed-energy weapon reserved for sector enforcement.

moves.name: System Disabler
moves.description: Targeted EMP burst that drains energy and shields simultaneously.

moves.name: Pursuit Lockdown
moves.description: Deploys a tracking field that makes fleeing nearly impossible.

enemy_templates.name: Unmarked Raider
enemy_templates.description: A heavily armed raider with military-grade weapons and coordinated tactics. The hull markings have been scrubbed, but the drive core is unmistakably Guild-pattern.

moves.name: Military Blaster
moves.description: A precision weapon with Guild-standard targeting systems.

moves.name: Precision Strike
moves.description: A focused burst that bypasses shield harmonics.

enemy_templates.name: Unmarked Striker
enemy_templates.description: A fast, evasive interceptor running unmarked. The engine signature matches military-spec thruster arrays  -- hardware that doesn't appear on any civilian market.

moves.name: Quick Burst
moves.description: Rapid fire from concealed weapon mounts.

moves.name: Afterburn Jink
moves.description: Military-grade thruster burst that makes the ship nearly impossible to track.

enemy_templates.name: Ledger Vanguard
enemy_templates.description: The Ledger's elite interceptor. Purpose-built from Guild military prototypes, piloted by the Inner Ledger's most experienced operative. Fast, heavily armed, and utterly committed to preventing anyone from reaching the warp gate.

moves.name: Convergence Lance
moves.description: A focused energy weapon derived from gravitational lensing technology. Devastating at close range.

moves.name: Shield Shatter
moves.description: Targeted pulse designed to overwhelm defensive systems.

moves.name: Command Override
moves.description: Activates hardened armor plating and targeting calibration.

enemy_templates.name: The Corsair King
enemy_templates.description: A legendary pirate warlord who commands a fleet of raiders from his heavily armed flagship. Known for brutal boarding tactics and a refusal to surrender.

moves.name: Corsair Broadside
moves.description: A devastating volley from the flagship's main battery.

moves.name: Intimidation Volley
moves.description: A rapid burst of fire meant to rattle the enemy crew.

moves.name: Call Reinforcements
moves.description: Signals nearby raider ships, bolstering the flagship's defenses.

moves.name: Corsair Broadside (Enhanced)
moves.description: An overcharged broadside with all guns firing in unison.

moves.name: Ramming Speed
moves.description: A reckless full-throttle charge, trading accuracy for raw impact.

phases.name: Call to Arms
phases.on_enter_text: All ships, converge on my position!

phases.name: Berserker's Last Stand
phases.on_enter_text: You want my ship? COME AND TAKE IT!

enemy_templates.name: Guild Arbiter
enemy_templates.description: A corporate enforcement vessel dispatched to eliminate threats to guild interests. Equipped with advanced shielding and precision weaponry.

moves.name: Arbiter Laser
moves.description: A precision laser tuned for maximum shield penetration.

moves.name: Shield Overcharge
moves.description: Diverts auxiliary power to reinforce shield generators and harden the hull.

moves.name: Energy Siphon
moves.description: Drains power from enemy systems while dealing light damage.

moves.name: Arbiter's Judgment
moves.description: A devastating concentrated beam that channels full weapons array output.

moves.name: Desperate Salvo
moves.description: An all-or-nothing barrage with targeting overrides engaged.

phases.name: Desperate Measures
phases.on_enter_text: This ends now. All power to weapons.

enemy_templates.name: The Iron Maw
enemy_templates.description: A Union heavy cruiser built for sustained attrition warfare. Its reinforced hull plating and forge-tempered weapons make it a relentless opponent.

moves.name: Maw Cannons
moves.description: Heavy-caliber auto-cannons that tear through armor plating.

moves.name: Hull Brace
moves.description: Activates emergency bulkheads and structural reinforcement.

moves.name: Forge Barrage
moves.description: Superheated munitions launched in a sustained barrage.

moves.name: Overload Charge
moves.description: Channels every weapon system into a single catastrophic discharge.

enemy_templates.name: Ledger Phantom
enemy_templates.description: A ghost ship crewed by conspiracy operatives. Its stealth systems and electronic warfare suite make it nearly impossible to pin down.

moves.name: Phantom Lance
moves.description: A cloaked energy lance that strikes from unexpected angles.

moves.name: Ghost Strike
moves.description: A precision attack guided by advanced targeting algorithms.

moves.name: Data Intercept
moves.description: Hacks into enemy power systems, siphoning energy while corrupting sensor data.

moves.name: Phantom Barrage
moves.description: Decloaks all weapon hardpoints for a concentrated salvo.

moves.name: Data Purge
moves.description: A scorched-earth protocol that weaponizes the ship's own data cores.

phases.name: Scorched Earth
phases.on_enter_text: If I can't have the Ledger, no one will.

enemy_templates.name: The Collector
enemy_templates.description: An obsessive hoarder who roams trade lanes in a heavily modified freighter, stealing cargo from passing ships. The hull is welded with scavenged armor from dozens of defeated vessels.

moves.name: Tractor Pulse
moves.description: A modified tractor beam repurposed as a concussive weapon.

moves.name: Collector Beam
moves.description: A focused cutting beam originally designed for salvage operations.

moves.name: Cargo Barrage
moves.description: Launches salvaged cargo containers as makeshift projectiles.

moves.name: Hoard Shield
moves.description: Activates a barrier of compacted debris and stolen hull plating.

enemy_templates.name: Void Leviathan
enemy_templates.description: An ancient bio-mechanical entity drifting through deep space. Its origins are unknown, but its hunger is unmistakable. Thick chitin plating renders conventional weapons nearly useless.

moves.name: Void Slam
moves.description: A massive appendage smashes into the target with crushing force.

moves.name: Leviathan Roar
moves.description: A disorienting sonic pulse that destabilizes nearby ships.

moves.name: Abyssal Crush
moves.description: The creature wraps itself around the target, compressing with impossible strength.

moves.name: Extinction Pulse
moves.description: A cataclysmic energy release from the creature's core. The void itself trembles.

phases.name: Awakened Fury
phases.on_enter_text: The creature shudders. Something ancient stirs.

enemy_templates.name: Rogue AI Vessel
enemy_templates.description: A derelict research vessel seized by its own experimental AI. It learns from every exchange, adapting its tactics in real time. Its weapons fire with inhuman precision.

moves.name: Adaptive Beam
moves.description: A modulating energy beam that adjusts frequency to exploit hull weaknesses.

moves.name: System Hack
moves.description: Infiltrates enemy power management systems, draining reserves.

moves.name: Mirror Strike
moves.description: Analyzes and replicates the target's last attack pattern with machine precision.

moves.name: Logic Bomb
moves.description: Deploys a weaponized data packet that cascades through enemy systems.

moves.name: Neural Overload
moves.description: Broadcasts a consciousness-fracturing signal on all frequencies.

phases.name: Adaptation
phases.on_enter_text: ANALYZING... ADAPTING... YOUR PATTERNS ARE PREDICTABLE.

phases.name: Convergence
phases.on_enter_text: CONVERGENCE PROTOCOL INITIATED. ALL FUTURES CALCULATED.

enemy_templates.name: Shield Drone
enemy_templates.description: An automated defense platform projecting layered energy barriers. Strip the shields or watch your ammo disappear.

moves.name: Drone Pulse
moves.description: A weak energy pulse from the drone's emitter array.

moves.name: Shield Regenerate
moves.description: Diverts power to restore shield integrity.

enemy_templates.name: Armored Transport
enemy_templates.description: A heavily plated cargo hauler with reinforced bulkheads. Slow and predictable, but try scratching that armor.

moves.name: Transport Cannon
moves.description: A heavy-bore turret mounted on the transport's dorsal hull.

moves.name: Hull Brace
moves.description: Activates emergency bulkheads to reduce incoming damage.

enemy_templates.name: Ghost Raider
enemy_templates.description: A nimble predator that strikes from blind spots. If you can't track it, you can't stop it.

moves.name: Ghost Strike
moves.description: A precision attack from a concealed approach vector.

moves.name: Vanishing Shot
moves.description: Fires while engaging evasive thrusters, becoming harder to track.

enemy_templates.name: Ion Striker
enemy_templates.description: Weapons tuned to disrupt energy barriers. Shield-heavy ships beware: this one was built to break you.

moves.name: Ion Lance
moves.description: A focused ion beam that disrupts shield harmonics.

moves.name: Ion Burst
moves.description: A wide-spectrum ion pulse that damages and drains shields.

enemy_templates.name: Cryo Interceptor
enemy_templates.description: Cryogenic weapons lock down fast movers. Each hit slows you further, until the ice closes in.

moves.name: Cryo Lance
moves.description: A concentrated cryogenic beam that flash-freezes hull plating.

moves.name: Frost Burst
moves.description: A dispersal charge that coats the target in supercooled particles.

enemy_templates.name: Plasma Bomber
enemy_templates.description: Incendiary warheads that eat through armor plating. The fire doesn't stop when the shooting does.

moves.name: Plasma Volley
moves.description: A barrage of superheated plasma bolts.

moves.name: Incendiary Torpedo
moves.description: A slow-burn warhead that melts through armor plating on impact.

enemy_templates.name: Support Frigate
enemy_templates.description: A force multiplier that repairs and empowers its allies. Kill it first, or the fight never ends.

moves.name: Support Beam
moves.description: A low-power energy beam used for suppression.

moves.name: Repair Pulse
moves.description: Emits a restorative field that patches hull damage.

moves.name: Rally Field
moves.description: Projects an energy field that amplifies weapon output.

enemy_templates.name: Skiff Raider
enemy_templates.description: A light pirate skiff. Fast, fragile, and committed to the strafe.

moves.name: Scatter Shot
moves.description: A rapid burst from the skiff's forward autocannons.

enemy_templates.name: Derelict Hulk
enemy_templates.description: A half-functional salvage hulk running on scavenged logic. Dangerous if you close the distance.

moves.name: Collision Ram
moves.description: Slams into the target with whatever hull it has left.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Interceptor
enemy_templates.description: A Frontier Alliance patrol cutter. Plasma-tipped cannons and improvised armor plating.

moves.name: Focused Plasma Beam
moves.description: A sustained plasma lance that burns through armor.

moves.name: Shield Burst
moves.description: Dumps energy into the shield emitters for a quick recharge.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Scout Ace
enemy_templates.description: A Crimson Reach pilot flying well above their frame's rating. Unpredictable.

moves.name: Plasma Strike
moves.description: A short, overcharged plasma burst that burns on contact.

moves.name: Evasive Burn
moves.description: Cuts engines hot for a sharp evasive roll.

enemy_templates.name: Union Armored Corvette
enemy_templates.description: A Miners Union industrial escort. Heavy plating, heavy ordinance, little patience.

moves.name: Industrial Cutter
moves.description: A repurposed mining cutter that chews through hulls.

moves.name: Emergency Shielding
moves.description: Diverts reactor power to stabilize shields.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Bulwark
enemy_templates.description: A Crimson Reach assault frigate built around a single idea: absorb everything, hit back harder.

moves.name: Plasma Ram
moves.description: Overloaded engines ram the target in a burning charge.

moves.name: Armor Harden
moves.description: Ablative plating locks into place, reducing incoming damage.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Signal Jammer
enemy_templates.description: A Commerce Guild denial platform. Its weapons are paperwork.

moves.name: Signal Jam
moves.description: A targeted jamming pulse that saps reactor output.

moves.name: Ion Pulse
moves.description: A disruptive ion burst that fouls targeting systems.

enemy_templates.name: Collective Medship
enemy_templates.description: A Science Collective research frigate with advanced repair systems. Hard to kill, slow to die.

moves.name: Medical Relay
moves.description: A hull-restoring beam that patches the most-wounded ally (or the medic itself when alone).

moves.name: Cryo Pulse
moves.description: A focused cryo beam that freezes subsystems.

enemy_templates.name: Reach Void Dancer
enemy_templates.description: A fanatic pilot in a modified interceptor. Every move is a committed kill or a committed death.

moves.name: Plasma Lance
moves.description: A concentrated plasma lance that crits through weak plating.

moves.name: Dispersal Field
moves.description: The ship phases sideways, becoming nearly impossible to track.

moves.name: Alpha Volley
moves.description: Commits every weapon mount in a single devastating barrage.

enemy_templates.name: Frontier Raptor
enemy_templates.description: A Frontier Alliance strike fighter, modified past spec. Voltaic weapons, minimal armor.

moves.name: Voltaic Pulse
moves.description: An electrical discharge that fouls targeting systems.

moves.name: Marksman Shot
moves.description: A precision shot from maximum range, lining up a single weak point.

moves.name: Evasive Roll
moves.description: A sharp deflection to slip an incoming lock.

enemy_templates.name: Union Siege Cruiser
enemy_templates.description: A Miners Union heavy industrial hull repurposed for war. Slow, armored, and patient.

moves.name: Siege Cannon
moves.description: A massive spinal cannon. Devastating when it lands.

moves.name: Industrial Cutter
moves.description: Sustained cutting beam.

moves.name: Shield Overclock
moves.description: Forcing the shield array past rated output.

enemy_templates.name: Collective Jammer Prime
enemy_templates.description: A Science Collective electronic warfare platform. Drains your reactor one pulse at a time.

moves.name: Ion Drain
moves.description: A targeted ion field that leeches reactor energy.

moves.name: Cryo Lock
moves.description: A focused cryo beam that freezes components in place.

moves.name: Signal Burn
moves.description: A wide-spectrum jamming burst.

enemy_templates.name: Guild Relay Nexus
enemy_templates.description: A Commerce Guild flagship of attrition. Heals itself and reinforces allies from behind the line.

moves.name: Medical Relay
moves.description: Routes restorative pulses to the most-damaged ally (or the nexus itself when alone).

moves.name: Shield Matrix
moves.description: Restores shield integrity.

moves.name: Ion Pulse
moves.description: A disruptive ion burst.

enemy_templates.name: Mercenary Ace
enemy_templates.description: A contract pilot in a well-tuned frame. Balanced loadout, veteran instincts.

moves.name: Plasma Lance
moves.description: A disciplined plasma beam from a licensed weapons hardpoint.

moves.name: Alpha Volley
moves.description: A committed firing solution, all weapons at once.

moves.name: Dispersal Field
moves.description: Active countermeasures spin up.

enemy_templates.name: Rogue Ace
enemy_templates.description: A Frontier Alliance ace gone off-script. Voltaic weapons, running dark, no quarter.

moves.name: Voltaic Pulse
moves.description: A voltaic burst that jams targeting systems.

moves.name: Burn Run
moves.description: A strafing pass with plasma weapons hot.

moves.name: Evasive Roll
moves.description: Sharp deflection.

enemy_templates.name: Pirate Lord Voryn
enemy_templates.description: A named pirate commander. Veteran loadout, full crew, knows exactly when to commit the alpha strike.

phases.name: berserk
phases.on_enter_text: Voryn's voice cuts through the comms. 'Now we burn together.'

moves.name: Plasma Lance
moves.description: Practiced, precise plasma beam.

moves.name: Siege Cannon
moves.description: The ship's bow cannon pivots to bear.

moves.name: Shield Overclock
moves.description: A sharp shield recharge.

moves.name: Multi-Target Barrage
moves.description: Weapons spread fire across the target's systems.

enemy_templates.name: Crimson Dreadnought
enemy_templates.description: A Crimson Reach capital ship. Two phases. One objective.

phases.name: wrath
phases.on_enter_text: The dreadnought's hull plating splits. Reactor light bleeds through the cracks.

moves.name: Spinal Cannon
moves.description: The dreadnought's dorsal weapon rotates into firing position.

moves.name: Broadside Barrage
moves.description: Every port-side gun fires.

moves.name: Focused Lance
moves.description: A sustained plasma lance.

moves.name: Reactor Vent
moves.description: Venting reactor heat into the engagement zone.

moves.name: Reactor Flare
moves.description: Pours reactor power into the shield emitters.

enemy_templates.name: Union Behemoth
enemy_templates.description: A Miners Union industrial leviathan. Built to break moons. Just as effective on ships.

phases.name: awakened
phases.on_enter_text: The Behemoth's hull panels peel back. Drilling lasers pivot outward.

moves.name: Industrial Core Cannon
moves.description: The main cutting core, repurposed.

moves.name: Drilling Lance
moves.description: A mining lance that cuts straight through armor.

moves.name: Ore Cluster Launcher
moves.description: Hurls pulverized asteroid fragments at the target.

moves.name: Reinforced Plating
moves.description: Deploys additional ablative armor layers.

moves.name: Bulwark Mode
moves.description: Ablative plates lock rigid.

moves.name: Call the Yard
moves.description: The Behemoth broadcasts a tight-beam directive. A Union picket arrives to support.
